title: Dictionary Word Entry
description: Schema for a single English -> Persian dictionary entry. One word = one JSON file. This schema is the contract that scripts/build.py relies on, and the contract contributors write against.

word.description: The English headword, lower-case, exactly as it should appear as the dictionary entry title (e.g. 'abandon').

level.description: Optional CEFR level (A1-C2), useful for learners and for future filtering/sorting features.

inflections.description: Optional alternate word forms (plurals, tenses, comparatives) that should also point to this entry in the Dictionary.app index.

parts_of_speech.description: One block per grammatical category the word can belong to (a word may be both a noun and a verb, etc.).

type.description: Part of speech label as it should be displayed, e.g. 'noun', 'verb', 'adjective', 'adverb'.

pronunciation_guide.description: Simple, non-technical respelling to help beginners, e.g. 'uh-BAN-dun'.

translations.description: One or more Persian translations/equivalents for this sense, ordered by how common they are.

definition_en.description: A concise English definition of this specific sense.

examples.description: Example sentences illustrating this sense, each with an English sentence and its Persian translation.

related_words.description: Derived or closely related words, shown in a 'Related Words' section.

pos.description: Optional part-of-speech label shown next to the related word, e.g. 'noun'.

idioms.description: Common expressions or idioms containing the headword.

notes.description: Free-form usage notes: grammar patterns, common confusions, register, etc.
